meaning: n.种植者,农作物,修剪机,割草机,收割机
examples: We nearly came a cropper in the second half of the game.
He got a cropper yesterday while out riding.
I gave it up ... self-denial is where I come a cropper.
When out-of-towners come a-cropper in Scores, most New Yorkers adopt a position of amused superiority.
"Whatever happens next I'll always be proudest of lovely Mrs Cropper, " said Hesmondhalgh .
